title: LGBTQ2+ Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > LGBTQ2+ Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Youth 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER MODERATED YOUTH CHAT ROOMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weekly moderated groups for LGBTQIA+ youth and for transgender, pan-gender, and gender-fluid teens to talk in a safe space and to be able to fully express themselves without fear of being made to feel uncomfortable or unwelcome. Participants discuss concerns and issues and talk about personal victories. 2261 Market Street #296 San Francisco, CA 94114 Eligibility: LGBTQIA+ Chat Room: Individuals age 12-19 who identify as LGBTQIA+ Transgender Teen Chat Room: Individuals age 19 and younger who identify as transgender, pan-gender, gender fluid, gender expansive, or questioning Hours: LGBTQIA+ Teen Chat Room: Tuesday/Wednesday 4pm-7pm Transgender Teen Chat Room: Thursday/Friday 4pm-7pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
